DRUG USE
IS
LIFE ABUSE

MEMBERS OF THE CITY COUNCIL
ANTHONY L. BLAND
LAWRENCE F. BUCHHEIM
DONALD P. JUDGE
GARY L. HAUSDORFER
PHILLIP R. SCHWARTZE

CITY MANAGER
STEPHEN B JULIAN

March 1, 1991

Mr. Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel
Fair Political Practices Commission
P. O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Re: Request for Advice

Dear Mr. Hallabrin:

This letter is submitted on behalf of City of San Juan Capistrano Planning
Commissioner, Dennis Haehn with regard to his possible participation as Planning
Commissioner on the Planning Commission in review of a proposed subdivision
(GlenFed H) within the City of San Juan Capistrano.

The facts are that the developer, GlenFed Development, Inc., is proposing a 60-lot
subdivision within a development site called the GlenFed H area as shown on the
attached Exhibit A. Mr. Haehn is a Planning Commissioner who resides approxi-
mately .3 miles from the project boundary line nearest his house; that is, he resides
within approximately 1500 feet of the nearest project boundary to his home. His
home has an approximate economic value of $350,000. The subdivision within which
Mr. Haehn lives is called the Los Corrales Tract.

A public hearing has been set for March 12, 1991 wherein the Planning Commission
will hold for its first initial review a public hearing on the proposed tentative
subdivision map for this project. Concerned citizens have already expressed concern
over several issues including traffic circulation emanating from the project site and
traveling down Camino La Ronda to La Novia (see Exhibit A).

The operative FPPC regulation appears to be 18702.3(a)(3) which provides:

32400 PASEO ADELANTO, SAN JUAN CAPISTRANO, CALIFORNIA 92675 • (714) 493-1171

Mr. Scott Hallabrin
March 1, 1991
Page Two


"(a) The effect of a decision is material as to real property in which
an official has a direct, indirect or beneficial ownership interest,
if any of the following applies:

(3)     The real property in which the official has an interest is
located outside a radius of 300 feet and any part of the
real property is located within a radius of 2500 feet of
the boundaries of the property which is the subject of the
decision and the decision will have a reasonably foreseeable financial effect of:

a)      $10,000 or more on the fair market value of the
real property in which the official has an
interest; or

b)      will affect rental value of the property by $1,000
or more per 12 month period."


On behalf of Mr. Haehn, an informal written opinion is requested as to whether Section
18702.3(a)(3) would bar him from participating on the proposed subdivision map at the
March 12 Planning Commission hearing.

We apologize for the reasonably short deadline for the opinion request, but in view of the
March 12 date, Mr. Haehn certainly would appreciate a response by that date.

Your cooperation is most appreciated.

Very truly yours,

[signature]

JOHN R. SHAW
City Attorney

JRS/ef

cc:     Mr. Dennis Haehn
        Planning Commissioner

Figure 9
Location of Other Developments

Legend
(A) Marbella Golf & Country Club
(B) Health Park
(C) San Juan Corporate Plaza
(D) Area A/Plazo del Obispo
(E) Historic Town Center
(F) Rancho San Juan
(G) Franciscan Plaza
(H) Glendale Federal Properties

(1) Paseo La Branza
(2) Vs Puntero
(3) Vs Fierro
(4) Calle San Remo
(5) Vs Montura
(6) Paseo Corrades
(7) Paseo Establo

Kunzman Associates

EXHIBIT 4
